# Spin Drop Tensiometry

**Summary**: A method to measure the interfacial tension between two immiscible liquids.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-al-azani|Al-Azani, 2024]] used a spinning drop tensiometer to measure oil/surfactant IFT.

## Key Results and Findings

- The GS and ZIS solutions reduced the oil/water IFT to less than 1.0 mN/m. ([[2024-al-azani|Al-Azani, 2024, p. 96]])
